title: Moisture Absorber – Non-Electric Dehumidifier for Bedroom, Bathroom & Wardrobe – Silent, Reusable 1L Moisture Trap – Fights Mould, Damp & Musty Smells – Includes 2x450g Refills (Misty Green)
features: REFILLABLE DEHUMIDIFIER – Rapidly removes excess moisture to help prevent damp, mould, and condensation without electricity or batteries.
SILENT & NON-ELECTRIC – Perfect for use in bedrooms, bathrooms, cupboards, caravans, or anywhere quiet dehumidification is needed.
REUSABLE & LONG-LASTING – Each tablet lasts 1–3 months depending on usage. Simply replace when needed for continuous freshness.
LARGE 1L CAPACITY – Extracts up to 1 litre of moisture per tablet, making it ideal for small to medium rooms, wardrobes or window ledges.
PREVENTS MUSTY SMELLS & MILDEW – Helps protect fabrics, furniture, and walls from moisture damage and lingering odours.
SLEEK & SMART – Modern design blends seamlessly into any space, while the transparent hue lets you easily monitor the water level.
description: Product Description Designed for Every Space Comfort in Your Living Room Keep your living room fresh with easy moisture control that maintains a clean, dry, comfortable space. Freshness in Your Entryway Reduce moisture from wet shoes and coats to keep your entryway clean, dry, and welcoming. Dryness in Your Bathroom Control dampness in bathrooms without ventilation so your floors stay dry and your routine stays comfortable. Clarity of Your Windows Prevent window damp with simple, effective moisture control for a cleaner, drier environment. Three Signature Colours Misty Green Runs 100% without electricity - zero energy cost and always ready to use. Midnight Blue Silent operation for peaceful night that won’t disturb your space. Pearl White Compact design that fits anywhere, with long-lasting durability. Easy Setup, Lasting Protection Perfectly Sized for Any Space Quietly settles into any corner Length: 12.9 cm Width: 12.9 cm Height: 18.3 cm Capacity: 1L Each tablet: 450g Lasts Up to 3 Months Tablet dissolves in Month 1; the collected liquid continues absorbing for up to 3 months, depending on conditions. How It Works First Set Up Open the lid, drop in the tablet, close it, and set it in place - quick and effortless. Easy Refill Replacement Replace the refill once the water level stops rising. Each tablet provides 2–3 months of performance, depending on environmental conditions.
